description_long: This object is a traditional Japanese-style sword, resembling a katana, with a long, gently curved single-edged blade. The blade is dark, likely made of steel, and features a sharp, pointed tip. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped in a black and white crisscross pattern, providing both grip and aesthetic appeal. A prominent, ornate gold-colored guard (tsuba) separates the blade from the handle, adding both protection and decorative value. The pommel at the end of the handle is rounded and matches the handle's color scheme. The overall design is elegant and functional, suitable for display or practical use.
description: A Japanese-style katana sword with a curved dark blade, ornate gold guard, and a black-and-white wrapped handle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved blade, ornate gold guard, and wrapped handle.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the thin blade profile and the circular guard with handle details.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the blade's curvature, handle wrapping, and guard from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the handle and the guard, with the blade extending away.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, black and white crisscross-wrapped, rounded pommel
